## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (tsc, 0 errors)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (generate + verify across all 6 languages)
- [ ] Generated SDKs keep a **zero-dependency** runtime
- [ ] If fixing a generator bug, added the triggering shape to `benchmarks/`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
